entries.source: "Ask me questions before explaining too much."
entries.value: "Niulize maswali kabla ya kueleza mengi sana."

entries.source: "Build a photosynthesis explanation with me"
entries.value: "Jenga maelezo ya usanisinuru pamoja nami"

entries.source: "Check my answer before giving yours."
entries.value: "Kagua jibu langu kabla ya kutoa lako."

entries.source: "Give me a harder version after I try."
entries.value: "Nipe toleo gumu zaidi baada ya kujaribu."

entries.source: "Help me plan an essay"
entries.value: "Nisaidie kupanga insha"

entries.source: "Keep it beginner friendly."
entries.value: "Liweke rafiki kwa anayeanza."

entries.source: "Let's learn fractions together"
entries.value: "Hebu tujifunze sehemu (fractions) pamoja"

entries.source: "Use examples from my exam, project, or daily life."
entries.value: "Tumia mifano kutoka mtihani wangu, mradi wangu, au maisha yangu ya kila siku."

entries.source: AI prompts
entries.value: Vidokezo vya AI

entries.source: Ask for a tiny first task.
entries.value: Omba kazi ndogo ya kwanza.

entries.source: Collaborative Instruction prompts and study loop
entries.value: Vidokezo na mzunguko wa masomo wa Collaborative Instruction

entries.source: End with a recap you write yourself.
entries.value: Malizia kwa muhtasari unaouandika mwenyewe.

entries.source: For Collaborative Instruction, a useful practice loop is:
entries.value: Kwa Collaborative Instruction, mzunguko wa mazoezi wenye manufaa ni:

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Open a shared workspace with an AI collaborator. Make a rough artifact, trade edits, challenge weak spots, log decisions, and leave with concrete progress.
entries.value: Kwa hali hii, kazi ni rahisi: fungua nafasi ya kazi ya pamoja na mshirika wa AI. Tengeneza kazi mbichi, badilishaneni marekebisho, changamkia sehemu dhaifu, rekodi maamuzi, na ondoka na maendeleo thabiti.

entries.source: Foundations
entries.value: Misingi

entries.source: Good prompts usually include three things: the subject, your current level, and the kind of help you want. You do not need perfect wording. You only need enough context for the session to begin.
entries.value: Vidokezo vizuri kwa kawaida hujumuisha mambo matatu: somo, kiwango chako cha sasa, na aina ya msaada unaotaka. Huhitaji maneno kamili. Unahitaji tu muktadha wa kutosha ili kipindi kianze.

entries.source: If the response feels too broad, narrow it. Ask for one example, one misconception, one check question, or one next step. If it feels too easy, ask for a challenge. If it feels too hard, ask for a bridge from what you already know.
entries.value: Ikiwa jibu linahisi pana sana, lipunguze. Omba mfano mmoja, dhana moja potofu, swali moja la ukaguzi, au hatua moja inayofuata. Ikiwa linahisi rahisi mno, omba changamoto. Ikiwa linahisi gumu mno, omba daraja kutoka unachojua tayari.

entries.source: Make the output more useful
entries.value: Fanya matokeo yawe na manufaa zaidi

entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Collaborative Instruction on inspir.
entries.value: Mawazo ya vidokezo na mzunguko wa masomo unaorudiwa ili kupata matokeo mazuri ya kujifunza kutoka Collaborative Instruction kwenye inspir.

entries.source: Reading an AI response is not the same as learning. After the first answer, ask the mode to make you do something with the idea.
entries.value: Kusoma jibu la AI si sawa na kujifunza. Baada ya jibu la kwanza, iombe hali hiyo ikufanye ufanye kitu na wazo hilo.

entries.source: Related learning paths
entries.value: Njia zinazohusiana za kujifunza

entries.source: Request feedback on the part that felt uncertain.
entries.value: Omba mrejesho kuhusu sehemu iliyohisi haina uhakika.

entries.source: Respond before asking for the solution.
entries.value: Jibu kabla ya kuomba suluhisho.

entries.source: Start with one clear request
entries.value: Anza na ombi moja lililo wazi

entries.source: State the goal in one sentence.
entries.value: Taja lengo kwa sentensi moja.

entries.source: study skills
entries.value: ujuzi wa kusoma

entries.source: That final recap is important. When you explain the idea back, you reveal what is solid and what is still borrowed from the AI.
entries.value: Muhtasari huo wa mwisho ni muhimu. Unapolieleza wazo tena, unaonyesha kilicho imara na kilichoazimwa bado kutoka kwa AI.

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. This mode is tuned for collaborative instruction with its own prompts, examples, and learning flow.
entries.value: Vipindi bora vya kujifunza vinaweza kurekebishwa. Hali hii imesanifiwa kwa ajili ya collaborative instruction ikiwa na vidokezo vyake, mifano, na mtiririko wa kujifunza.

entries.source: The fastest way to get value from Collaborative Instruction is to give the AI a learning job, not just a topic. A topic says what you are interested in. A learning job says what kind of help you need.
entries.value: Njia ya haraka zaidi ya kupata thamani kutoka Collaborative Instruction ni kuipa AI kazi ya kujifunza, si mada tu. Mada husema unachokipenda. Kazi ya kujifunza husema aina ya msaada unaohitaji.

entries.source: Then add a constraint that makes the session more personal:
entries.value: Kisha ongeza kizuizi kinachofanya kipindi kiwe cha kibinafsi zaidi:

entries.source: Try one of these starters:
entries.value: Jaribu vianzio hivi:

entries.source: Turn the mode into practice
entries.value: Geuza hali kuwa mazoezi

entries.source: Use Collaborative Instruction when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Socratic Instruction. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Tumia Collaborative Instruction wakati hii ndiyo hali inayofaa kwa kazi hiyo. Ukitaka njia inayohusiana, jaribu Socratic Instruction. Unaweza pia kuvinjari blogu ya kujifunza kwa AI kwa mbinu za kusoma, kujifunza kwa Kisokrati, flashcards, uigizaji wa majukumu, na kukumbuka kwa bidii.
